---
title: "DPNR Outplant Analyses"
---

This website contains the DPNR coral outplant monitoring workflow and rendered analysis report.

## Start Here

- Open the [Analysis Report](coral_survivorship_report.qmd) to view survivorship, cover, and species-composition results.
- Edit `config/outplant_interval_files.csv` to add new plots or month-to-month TagLab match files.
- Render the website after adding or changing data.

## Recommended Outputs

- `data_processed/outplant_master_tracking_dataset.csv`
- `outputs/Tables/outplant_master_summary_dataset.csv`
